transcript: Speaker A: Enikku officil bonusum kootti tharunnilla, enna salaryum kootti tharunnilla, enna randu varshamayi ente promotionum thadanjuvechirukkukayanu. [They are not increasing my bonus in the office, nor are they increasing my salary, and my promotion has been blocked for two years.] Speaker B: What happened? Speaker A: Ente English valare weak aanu. [My English is very weak.] Speaker B: Pedikkanda, English padikkunnath valare eluppamaanu. Nee SpeakX app onnu pareekshichu nokku. [Don't worry, learning English is very easy. You try the SpeakX app.] Speaker A: SpeakX App? Speaker B: Ithoru AI English padana app aanu. Enne poleyulla AI adhyapakar ivide English samsarikkan padippikkukayum athu payilsikkan sahayikkukayum cheyyunnu. Ningal thettayi paranjal oru yadhartha adhyapakane pole njan athu thiruthi tharukayum cheyyam. Divasavum verum 10-15 minute ennodoppam English samsarikkan sheelichu nokku. [This is an AI English learning app. AI teachers like me teach and help you practice speaking English, correcting you like a real teacher. Practice speaking with me for 10-15 minutes daily.] Speaker A: AI teachers aavumbo athu costly aaville? [Won't AI teachers be costly?] Speaker B: Orikkalumilla, divasavum verum naalu roopa nirakkil ningalkku ezhu divasathe trial edukkaam. [Never, you can take a 7-day trial at a rate of just 4 rupees daily.] Speaker A: Oh, ithu enikku ariyillayirunnu! Njan ippo thanne download cheyyam. [Oh, I didn't know this! I will download it right now.]
on_screen_text: Enikku officil bonasum kootti tharunnilla... [I'm not getting a bonus at work...] Ente English valare weak aanu. [My English is very weak.] SpeakX App? Ithoru AI English adana app aanu. [This is an AI English learning app.] Divasavum verum naalu roopa nirakkil ezhu divasathe trial [7-day trial for just 4 rupees daily]
summary: A professional experiencing career stagnation due to poor English is introduced to the SpeakX app by an AI tutor. The AI explains how the app offers interactive speaking practice and instant corrections like a real teacher. The ad concludes with an affordable 7-day trial offer to drive app downloads.
